title: Fix Work Order Button & Revert Cashier/Inventory Pages to Version 15

requirements.text: Fix the Work Order button on the Service page (ServicePage.tsx) so that clicking it correctly opens the work order detail or completion dialog. The button must be fully functional and respond to click events without errors.

quotes: mala jadi tidak berfungsi tombol work order nya saat di klik

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Work Order button on the Service page opens the expected dialog or navigates to the expected view without errors.
No console errors are thrown when clicking the Work Order button.
The Work Order button is visually enabled and responds to click events.

requirements.text: Revert CashierPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the cashier page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.

quotes: halaman kasir dan halaman inventory minta dikembalikan seperti draft version 15

acceptanceCriteria: The Cashier page UI and behavior matches the Draft Version 15 state.
Cart, transaction completion, and receipt printing work as they did in Version 15.
No Version 16–19 regressions remain on the Cashier page.

requirements.text: Revert InventoryPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the inventory page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.

quotes: halaman kasir dan halaman inventory minta dikembalikan seperti draft version 15

acceptanceCriteria: The Inventory page UI and behavior matches the Draft Version 15 state.
Adding, editing, deleting, and bulk importing/exporting inventory items work as they did in Version 15.
No Version 16–19 regressions remain on the Inventory page.

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo unless strictly necessary to support the Version 15 frontend revert.
Do not alter immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui).
Preserve all Version 19 features on pages other than Cashier and Inventory (e.g., Service page work order completion dialog, technician field, save-and-transaction navigation).
nonGoals: Reverting the Service page (ServicePage.tsx) — only fix the broken Work Order button.
Reverting TransactionHistoryPage, ReportsPage, SettingsPage, or any other pages.
Changing the backend data model or stored state.
Introducing new features beyond the revert and button fix.
